mapper.sql: u.id, u.email, u.password_enabled, u.name, u.email_verified, u.user_type, u.role, u.status, u.plan, u.credit, u.last_login_at, u.dormant_at, u.blocked_reason, u.blocked_until, u.deleted_at, u.status_changed_at, u.status_changed_by, u.failed_login_count, u.last_failed_login_at, u.created_at, u.updated_at, COALESCE(login_stats.success_count, 0) AS login_success_count, COALESCE(login_stats.fail_count, 0) AS login_fail_count

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, SUM(CASE WHEN success = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_count, SUM(CASE WHEN success = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fail_count FROM user_login_history WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY user_id ) login_stats ON login_stats.user_id = u.id
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_consent WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET status = #{status}, blocked_reason = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'BLOCKED' THEN #{reason} ELSE NULL END, blocked_until = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'BLOCKED' THEN #{blockedUntil} ELSE NULL END, dormant_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'DORMANT' THEN COALESCE(dormant_at, NOW()) ELSE NULL END, deleted_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'DELETED' THEN COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()) ELSE NULL END, status_changed_at = NOW(), status_changed_by = #{actorUserId} WHERE id = #{id}
